title: Falleen's Fist
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Fist}} {{SpaceStation |image=[[File:HB_SotE_skyhook_death.jpg]] |name=''Falleen's Fist'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Core Worlds Engineering/Legends|Core Worlds Engineering]]''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' |line=[[Skyhook/Legends|Skyhook]] |model=[[Skyhook Platform]] |type=[[Space station/Legends|Space station]] |cost=25 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] |modifier=[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] |sysmods= |length=1,200 meters |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers=1,000 |capacity=50,000 metric tons |cargohandling= |consumables=6 months |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] |sector=[[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]] |system=[[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]] |coordinates=L-9 |xyz= |orbited=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |distance= |routes= |role=[[Flagship/Legends|Flagship]] |affiliation=*[[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] *[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] |constructed= |destroyed=[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]] |retired= |battles=[[Battle over Coruscant]] |owners=[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|An encoded transmission from the ship ''Virago'', my lord, en route to the skyhook ''Falleen's Fist'' in high orbit. The ship is registered to—"
"I know who it is registered to.|An ''Executor'' commander and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]}} '''''Falleen's Fist''''' was the personal [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] leader [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]. Unlike the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]], who kept his most prized possessions aboard his [[Emperor's skyhook|skyhook]], Xizor preferred to keep his best treasures on the ground within his [[Xizor's Palace|palace]]. The skyhook was armed with Xizor's personal navy, complete with [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]], [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], and hundreds of rebuilt surplus [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]. The command center was a deck surrounded by [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] plate, allowing the commander a 360-degree unimpeded view of the vicinity space. ==History== In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] infiltrated the Black Sun palace in order to rescue [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] held captive by Xizor. On their way to the landing pad to complete their rescue and escape, Lando, in a moment of pure inspiration, threw a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] in a garbage chute, thus dooming the palace. The chaos helped the rebels continue their escape, as Xizor took his personal express turbolift to reach the top and escape with ''[[Virago]]'' to his skyhook. On his way he ordered his navy to destroy or capture the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] which would carry the infiltrators, thus completing his planned demise of Skywalker. [[File:Executoropenup.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Executor'' unleashes turbolaser fire on ''Falleen's Fist'']] During the [[Battle over Coruscant]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] commanded the skyhook to be destroyed by the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] because Xizor was attempting to kill [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] who was aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] with his [[StarViper-class attack platform/Legends|''StarViper''s]]. The skyhook was destroyed, killing Xizor in the process. ==Behind the scenes== In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], a different version of the battle takes place, giving Dash Rendar a major role. While a Star Destroyer is present and bombarding the station, Dash actually flies into the Skyhook with his [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']], mirroring the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and takes out the core inside. The skyhook appears in some cards of the [[1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|1996 Topps ''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']] series, in a similar appearance to that of the video game, with four long hollow shafts radiating from a cylindrical core towards all directions, into which Dash Rendar actually flies. This appearance is followed also in the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]{{SWGTCG|set=Agents of Deception|swglink=Falleensfist.JPG|cardname=Falleen's Fist Blueprints}} The comic [[Shadows of the Empire 6|''Shadows of the Empire'' 6]] deviates from this depiction, where the skyhook appears as a red space station whose main body is saucer-shaped. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] *[[Star
